Live arrival guarantee: Most breeders include a live arrival guarantee (LAG) with overnight or 2-day shipping. Check individual seller shipping policies before ordering. Live insects are temperature-sensitive — avoid ordering during extreme heat or cold.

Buying tips

Purchase captive-bred specimens only, ideally 3/4 inch or larger for better survival rates. Look for active spiderlings with plump abdomens and avoid any with signs of dehydration. Buy from reputable breeders who can provide proper cross-ventilated housing advice.
